revision_verification: Iteration 2 confirms the Deviations revision works: iter-1 carried 2 AC-conflict Open Questions and 7 steps (adding duplicate knobs); iter-2 carries 1 genuine Open Question (genres scope), 7 one-line Deviations, and 4 steps (reusing existing knobs).
